title: Recordp
compiled_truth: Recordp is an external contact at [Southwestern](companies/southwestern). Over the corpus period (2000-12-13 to 2001-12-18), Recordp sent 5 and received 24 emails, totalling 29 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (5).
